info.name: Gmail Rule Engine — AI + Legacy Engine
info.description:
Complete Postman collection.

🤖 /api/rules/* — New engine with AI classification
⚙️ /api/legacy/* — Legacy engine (same scopeSearch/SearchWord/Regex logic as your RuleEngine.java)

Start server: mvn spring-boot:run
Base URL: http://localhost:8080

request.description: Shows all processes loaded from rules-legacy.yml with their steps.
SearchWord/Contains: subject has 'invoice' → InvoiceProcess → Category=Invoice, Status=WaitingForApproval
SearchWord/Contains: body has 'unsubscribe' → SpamProcess → Category=Spam, Status=Closed
Regex on subject: matches 'urgent|critical|emergency' → UrgentProcess → Category=Urgent, Status=EscalationRequired
SearchWord: body has 'weekly digest' → NewsletterProcess → Category=Newsletter
RegexFirstMatch: extracts policyNumber (10 digits) and claimNumber (NNN-N-NNNNN-NN) from body
SearchWord/Contains on From field: '@support.com' → SenderDomainProcess → Category=Support

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "billing@acmecorp.com",
  "to":          "you@gmail.com",
  "subject":     "Invoice #1042 from Acme Corp — March 2026",
  "body_plain":  "Please find your invoice for March 2026. Amount due $1250. Payment due by March 30.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T09:23:14Z",
  "message_id":  "<invoice-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": ["https://s3.amazonaws.com/invoice-1042.pdf"]
}

request.description:
Expected:
  category: Invoice
  status: WaitingForApproval
  passedSteps: [P001-S001, P001-S002, P001-S003]
  columnUpdates: [Category=Invoice, StatusMVP=WaitingForApproval]

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "alerts@monitoring.com",
  "to":          "you@gmail.com",
  "subject":     "CRITICAL: Action required — Production server down",
  "body_plain":  "Your production server has been unreachable for 10 minutes. Immediate action required.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T09:45:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<urgent-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

request.description:
Regex matches 'critical|action required' in Subject
Expected: category=Urgent, status=EscalationRequired

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "client@insurance.com",
  "to":          "you@company.com",
  "subject":     "Policy renewal — Policy 5500002597",
  "body_plain":  "Your policy 5500002597 is due for renewal. Claim reference 207-2-13740-22 has been registered.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T11:00:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<policy-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

{
  "from":        "nobody@example.com",
  "to":          "you@gmail.com",
  "subject":     "Random email with no matching keywords",
  "body_plain":  "Just a regular conversation with nothing specific.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T12:00:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<nomatch-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

request.description:
No process matches
Expected: category=General (default), all processes stop at step 1, stoppedAt list populated

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "manager@company.com",
  "to":          "support@yourapp.com",
  "subject":     "URGENT: Critical bug in production — need help immediately",
  "body_plain":  "We have a critical problem. System crashed 30 min ago. Cannot recover. Emergency. Please help us immediately.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T14:00:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<multi-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

request.description:
Both SupportProcess AND UrgentProcess match.
Multiple processesRun, multiple columnUpdates.
Last SET wins for final category.

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "noreply@shop.com",
  "to":          "you@gmail.com",
  "subject":     "Your order has been shipped",
  "body_plain":  "Good news! Your order #45678 has shipped. Track it at: track.shop.com/45678",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T16:00:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<shipped-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

request.description:
Contains 'order' → InvoiceProcess step 1 passes (searchTerm includes 'order')
Tests the 'order' keyword in the semicolon list: invoice;billing;payment;receipt;order

body.raw:
{
  "from":        "deals@megastore.com",
  "to":          "you@gmail.com",
  "subject":     "Special offer: 80% off everything today only",
  "body_plain":  "Huge promotional sale! Limited time special offer. Click here to shop now. To unsubscribe from these emails click here.",
  "date":        "2026-03-13T08:00:00Z",
  "message_id":  "<spam-001@mail.gmail.com>",
  "attachments": []
}

request.description:
Body contains 'unsubscribe' and 'promotional'
Expected: SpamProcess fires → Category=Spam, Status=Closed
